cards.name: Archangel Michael
cards.reading: Archangel Michael steps forward as a powerful protector, surrounding you with courage, strength and divine light. His presence reminds you that you are never facing life alone, even when the path feels uncertain or heavy. Michael encourages you to stand firmly in your truth, release fear from your heart and trust the quiet strength that already lives within you. This is a message of protection, bravery and spiritual support. You may be guided to set stronger boundaries, speak with confidence or move away from anything that drains your energy. Michael brings the reminder that your spirit is stronger than your doubts, and that you are being supported as you step forward with courage, clarity and faith.

cards.name: Archangel Gabriel
cards.reading: Archangel Gabriel arrives with a message of clarity, expression and divine communication. Gabriel encourages you to listen carefully to the thoughts, dreams and signs that are trying to reach you now. This archangel supports writing, speaking, creativity and heartfelt truth, helping you find the words that need to be shared. If you have felt unsure how to express yourself, Gabriel gently reminds you that your voice matters and your message has meaning. This card may also bring nurturing energy around children, new beginnings or something precious that is waiting to be born into the world. Gabriel asks you to trust your inner messenger and allow inspiration to flow through you with grace.

cards.name: Archangel Raphael
cards.reading: Archangel Raphael brings a beautiful wave of healing, peace and renewal. His energy surrounds the heart, body and emotions with gentle green light, helping you release what has felt heavy or tender. Raphael reminds you that healing is not always instant; sometimes it unfolds slowly, through rest, forgiveness, self-kindness and trust. This card may appear when your spirit is asking for care, balance and a softer pace. Raphael also offers protection during journeys, whether physical travel or an emotional transition. You are being encouraged to honour your wellbeing, listen to what your body and heart are asking for, and allow divine healing to move through your life in a calm and loving way.

cards.name: Archangel Uriel
cards.reading: Archangel Uriel steps forward as the angel of wisdom, illumination and inner knowing. His light shines into confusion, helping you see a situation from a higher and clearer perspective. If you have been searching for answers, Uriel reminds you that wisdom often arrives quietly, as a sudden understanding, a peaceful realisation or a gentle knowing in your heart. This card encourages you to trust your intelligence, intuition and life experience. Problems that once felt overwhelming may begin to feel more manageable when viewed through the light of patience and spiritual insight. Uriel asks you to slow down, breathe, and allow the truth to reveal itself naturally.

cards.name: Archangel Chamuel
cards.reading: Archangel Chamuel brings the energy of unconditional love, compassion and emotional connection. His presence reminds you that love is not only something you seek from others, but something that begins within your own heart. Chamuel may appear when relationships, self-worth or emotional healing are coming into focus. This card encourages gentleness, forgiveness and a willingness to see yourself and others through kinder eyes. Chamuel can also help you find what feels lost, whether that is peace, direction, confidence or a sense of belonging. You are being guided back to love, back to softness, and back to the truth that your heart is worthy of care, respect and deep healing.

cards.name: Archangel Jophiel
cards.reading: Archangel Jophiel arrives with beauty, inspiration and the gentle power of positive thought. Her presence encourages you to notice the light around you, even if life has recently felt dull, heavy or uncertain. Jophiel reminds you that beauty is not only found in appearance, but in ideas, kindness, creativity and the way you choose to see the world. This card may be guiding you to clear your mind, refresh your surroundings or reconnect with something that makes your soul feel alive. Jophiel supports creativity and helps shift negative thinking into a more hopeful perspective. You are being invited to bring more grace, colour and inspiration into your life.

cards.name: Archangel Zadkiel
cards.reading: Archangel Zadkiel brings the sacred energy of forgiveness, mercy and emotional release. His presence does not ask you to ignore what has happened, but to free your spirit from carrying pain longer than it needs to. Zadkiel encourages compassion for yourself and others, helping you soften resentment, guilt or old emotional burdens. This card may appear when your heart is ready to heal from the past and make space for peace. Zadkiel also supports memory and learning, reminding you that every experience has offered wisdom, even the difficult ones. You are being gently guided to release what weighs you down and step into a more peaceful state of grace.

cards.name: Archangel Haniel
cards.reading: Archangel Haniel brings a soft, luminous energy of joy, grace and heightened intuition. Her presence is deeply connected to the moon, emotions and the quiet wisdom that speaks from within. Haniel encourages you to trust your subtle feelings, your dreams and the gentle nudges that may not make logical sense at first, but feel true in your heart. This card may appear when your spirit is seeking more beauty, emotional balance and sacred feminine energy. Haniel reminds you that joy does not always have to be loud; sometimes it arrives as peace, softness and the feeling of being spiritually held. You are being guided to honour your intuition and move with grace.

cards.name: Archangel Raguel
cards.reading: Archangel Raguel steps forward with the energy of harmony, fairness and divine order. His presence may appear when relationships, disagreements or situations of imbalance need healing. Raguel encourages honesty, mutual respect and peaceful resolution, helping you see where balance can be restored. This card reminds you that true harmony does not come from avoiding truth, but from approaching it with wisdom, compassion and integrity. If something has felt unfair, tense or unresolved, Raguel brings the message that peace is possible when all sides are seen more clearly. You are being guided to seek balance, act with fairness and trust that harmony can return in the right way and time.

cards.name: Archangel Ariel
cards.reading: Archangel Ariel brings a strong and nurturing connection to nature, animals and the abundance of the earth. Her presence reminds you that you are supported not only spiritually, but also through the physical world around you. Ariel may appear when you are being guided to spend time in nature, protect your energy, care for animals or reconnect with the grounding power of the earth. This card also carries a message of abundance, reminding you that your needs can be met when you trust, take practical steps and remain open to receiving support. Ariel encourages courage, stewardship and gratitude for the blessings already present in your life.

cards.name: Archangel Azrael
cards.reading: Archangel Azrael arrives with deep compassion, comfort and gentle support through times of change. His energy is especially present during endings, transitions, grief or emotional release. Azrael does not bring fear; he brings peace, reminding you that every ending carries a sacred passage into something new. This card may appear when your heart is processing loss, change or the closing of an important chapter. Azrael surrounds you with tenderness and reassurance, helping you move through emotions at your own pace. You are being reminded that healing is allowed to be gentle, and that even in uncertain moments, your soul is being lovingly supported.

cards.name: Archangel Raziel
cards.reading: Archangel Raziel steps forward as the keeper of divine mysteries, spiritual wisdom and hidden knowledge. His presence suggests that something deeper is being revealed to you now, even if you do not yet fully understand it. Raziel supports intuition, manifestation, sacred insight and the remembrance of wisdom carried within the soul. This card may appear when you are awakening to new spiritual understanding, noticing signs, or feeling drawn toward the unseen layers of life. Raziel reminds you that not every answer comes through logic; some truths are felt, remembered and revealed in divine timing. You are being invited to trust the mystery and recognise your own spiritual power.
